storyHook: 登录账户，转账或缴费，确认余额

narrative.when: 周三晚上，月底要交房租
narrative.where: 甲的房间，手机或电脑前
narrative.who: 甲（账户主人）· 乙（客服，电话里指导）
narrative.how: 登录账户，按步骤操作转账
narrative.method: 登录账户、输入金额和账号、确认转账、核对余额
narrative.event: 甲忘了这个月的房租还没交，怕超过日期

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I need to get to my account.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put in your name and secret word.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. The page is getting ready.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time, no need to be quick.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The money is enough for the payment.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good, then let us go to the send money part.
turns.zh: 很好，那我们去转账页面。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see the button for sending money.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Give it a push and we will make a start.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, the form is open. What is first?
turns.zh: 好的，表格打开了。先填什么？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: First, put in the account number of the man who gets the money.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have his number here. Let me put it in.
turns.zh: 我这儿有他的账号，输进去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Be certain every number is right.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What is after that?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now the price. How much for the room?
turns.zh: 现在填金额，房间费用是多少？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One thousand two hundred. I will put that down.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now look at the number again.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is the same as his note. All good.
turns.zh: 和他给的纸条一样，没问题。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then put in the price. One thousand two hundred.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. The number is in the box.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: See the name of the man who gets it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it is Green. That is right.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now push the button to send it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do that now. There it goes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep still till the green light. It is done.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The money is sent. That is a weight off.
turns.zh: 钱转过去了，心里一块石头落地了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now see what money you have left.
turns.zh: 好的，现在看看你还有多少钱。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will go back to the first page.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What does it say?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It says eight hundred and fifty.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is enough for this month, then?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope so. I have food and car to get.
turns.zh: 希望吧，还得买吃的和车费。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You will be all right. Keep the numbers in your head.
turns.zh: 没问题的，心里有数就行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I will be more wise from now on.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is there anything more I can do for you?
turns.zh: 还有其他需要帮忙的吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that is all. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 没了，就这些。谢谢你的帮助。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, now please put in the number of the account.
turns.zh: 好，现在请输入收款账号。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have it here. One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight.
turns.zh: 我这里有。一二三四五六七八。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now put in the amount.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Eight hundred and fifty. Done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Make certain the details are right before you say yes.
turns.zh: 请确认信息无误再点确认。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I have looked at them. They are right.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then go on and say yes to send it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. There, it is done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. The money will go through in a short time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a weight off my mind.
turns.zh: 我心里一块石头落地了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Would you like to see your balance?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, please. Let me go back to the front page.
turns.zh: 好的，请稍等。我返回首页。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see it now. It is lower, but still safe.
turns.zh: 看到了。余额少了，但还算安全。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Anything more?
turns.zh: 那就好。还有其他需要吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you for helping me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. Have a rest up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. sure.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: sure.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the phone down now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. be safe.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, you too. sure.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good day.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The talk is done. I am free.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Time for a cup of tea.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I am in my account now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now go to the send money part.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see it. What number do I put?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put the number from your house owner.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am putting it in now. Done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now the amount. How much?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One thousand two hundred fifty.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put that in and have a look.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is right. I will send it now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Look for the done sign.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It says 'done'. That is good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the money is on its way.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us see the amount now?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, go back to the first page.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see it. The number is lower now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is it still enough for this month?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, but not much more. I will go at a quiet rate.
turns.zh: 够，但剩不多了。我会慢点用。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Any more to give?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that is all. Thanks for your help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No problem at all.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will put in the account number now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. No need to be quick.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The number is in. Now the amount.
turns.zh: 账号输好了。现在填金额。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is that the full payment for this month?
turns.zh: 这是这月的整笔付款吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, the full number. Here it goes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Please see the name and number again.
turns.zh: 请再核对一下户名和账号。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: All good. I will say yes now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep an eye on the green light.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It says done. The money is on its way.
turns.zh: 显示完成了。钱已经转出。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good work. That is the last step.
turns.zh: 干得好。这是最后一步了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me see the balance now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It went down, but still safe.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Will that be all for tonight?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is all. Thank you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do not mention it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And you. okay.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the page away now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep in mind to go out.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I am out. All done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. rest up after this.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will turn off the light now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. Rest your eyes.
turns.zh: 好主意。让眼睛休息一下。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The house payment is done. That is a weight off.
turns.zh: 房租交了。心里一块石头落地了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quite. You kept to the last day.
turns.zh: 确实。你赶在了最后一天。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I almost let it go. What a simple man I am.
turns.zh: 是啊，我差点忘了。我真傻。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: But you did it. That is what is important.
turns.zh: 但你办到了。这才是重要的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will keep my eyes open from now.
turns.zh: 说得对。以后我会多留神。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now get some sleep.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. rest up, and thanks for your help.
turns.zh: 好的。好好休息，谢谢你的帮助。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. Good night.

storyBlurb: 月底房租未交，甲登录网银紧急转账。在客服电话指导下，他一步步操作，最终确认余额松了一口气。
storyScript:
【开场·登录账户】周三晚上十点，甲突然想起这个月的房租还没交。他慌忙打开手机银行，指尖在屏幕上轻点，输入那串熟悉的账号和密码。页面加载的几秒里，他的心悬着，生怕错过最后期限。终于，账户首页跳出，余额数字映入眼帘——还够付房租，但所剩不多。他深吸一口气，点开转账功能。

【进行·办理转账】甲拨通客服电话，乙的声音平稳传来：请先输入收款账号。他对照房东发来的信息，一个个数字敲进框里。接着是金额，他犹豫了一下，还是填上了那个数字。乙提醒：请确认转账信息。甲仔细核对账号和金额，手指在确认键上停留片刻，然后按下。页面显示转账处理中，他盯着那个旋转的图标，直到成功提示弹出。

【进行·核对余额】转账完成，甲没有立刻退出。他返回账户首页，刷新余额。数字减少了，但还在安全范围内。他想起这个月的生活费，默默计算着剩下的钱能否撑到发薪日。乙在电话里询问：还有其他需要吗？甲说没有，声音里带着一丝疲惫。

【收束·核对离开】甲退出网银，手机屏幕暗下来。他靠在椅背上，窗外的夜色深沉。房租交了，这个月的压力暂时缓解。他关掉台灯，房间陷入黑暗，只有手机屏幕的微光映着他的脸。明天，又是新的一天。
